subject: Cloud Computing
title: Machine Learning Data Needs
description: A quick, practical guide to Machine Learning Data Needs.

hook.text: Training a large AI model requires petabytes of data and thousands of GPUs. Only the cloud can provide both at once.

buildup.text: ML needs data storage, processing power, and fast data pipelines — all at scales most companies can't build alone.

discovery.text: Cloud ML platforms — SageMaker, Vertex AI, Azure ML — provide everything from data labeling to model deployment.

twist.text: The data is often harder than the model. Collecting, cleaning, and labeling training data consumes 80% of ML effort.

climax.text: Cloud democratized ML. What once required a research lab now runs on managed services accessible to any developer.

punchline.text: AI runs on data. Cloud provides the data infrastructure at scale.

quiz.question: What consumes most of the effort in machine learning projects?
options: Collecting, cleaning, and labeling the training data
Choosing which cloud provider to use
Writing the final model deployment code
